name: Notepad Region Monitor
description: Canonical window-region pack: open a UI, define a region inside the window, and capture only that region repeatedly.

observationPlan.statusChangeHint: Use visible text changes inside the editor region as the signal.
observationPlan.notes: This pack demonstrates a WindowRegion target rather than full-window capture.

queue.consumerHint: A downstream analyzer can OCR or diff just the monitored editor region.
queue.analysisHint: Use region-only captures when the app chrome is noisy and the decision signal lives inside one panel.
